data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where the customer view is confused with the provider view. However, there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this scenario has been executed or that the expected results have been captured. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide sufficient context or validation for this specific scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of the scenario being simulated or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the persona scenario.
